metadata.seed: Well, just kind of. Helpless and hopeless, really. Like I said, just finding a job. I really don't know what I want to do anymore. After I graduated, I thought I was gonna get into business, but I just really don't know if that's for me. My parents always kind of gave me everything too. So the reason why I have my own apartment is because they bought it for me. But it was under the conditions of having to be in the same town as them. And so it's like I'm at a loss and I could continue just loving off my parents money, but then that kind of feels. I feel like I don't have a purpose. Like my purpose really just going to be to live off my parents money and kind of do whatever they want me to do and just to keep their money and their resources. So I'm just kind of at a loss right now in my life.

And so it's like I'm at a loss and I could continue just loving off my parents money, but then that kind of feels. I feel like I don't have a purpose. Like my purpose really just going to be to live off my parents money and kind of do whatever they want me to do and just to keep their money and their resources. So I'm just kind of at a loss right now in my life.

I feel like I don't have a purpose
I'm just living off my parents' money

It sounds like you're feeling lost and unsure about your future, especially when it comes to finding a job and figuring out what you really want. These feelings can be overwhelming, but remember that it's okay not to have everything figured out right away. Let's work together to explore some alternative perspectives and help you find a sense of purpose.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I do feel a bit lost. It’s just… I used to have a clearer idea of what I wanted, but now I just feel stuck. I worry that I’m wasting time or that I’ll make the wrong choice. It’s frustrating. I wish I could just see a clear path ahead.

automatic_thoughts: I used to have a clearer idea of what I wanted
I worry that I’m wasting time
I wish I could just see a clear path ahead

patient.query: I appreciate that. It’s just that every time I think about what I should do next, I feel this heavy weight, like there’s so much pressure to get it right. Sometimes I even doubt if I’m good enough for the things I want to pursue. It’s exhausting, honestly.

triggers: thinking about what to do next

patient.query: Yeah, that sounds right. It’s just hard to shake off those doubts, you know? I feel like everyone around me has it all figured out, and here I am just... stuck. I want to move forward, but it’s like I can’t even see the first step. That just adds to the frustration.

patient.query: I mean, maybe. I just see so many people advancing and achieving things, and it makes me question why I can’t seem to get there. It’s like I’m on this treadmill, running but not getting anywhere. But then I feel guilty for feeling this way because I know everyone has their struggles. It’s just hard to balance that.

patient.query: Yeah, it definitely feels like I’m in a constant comparison game. I guess I just want to feel okay with where I’m at without feeling so weighed down by what everyone else is doing. It’s hard to shake that feeling of not measuring up, you know? Sometimes I wish I could just find a way to be content with my own journey.
